title: Senior Software Engineer - Airtel India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Airtel India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Airtel India family as a Senior Software Engineer in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Airtel India:
Airtel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Airtel India!
